pages.content: Alexander Hamilton was the first Treasury Secretary of the United States.
He was appointed by President George Washington in 1789.
Hamilton helped establish the national banking system.
He played an important role in shaping the financial foundation of the United States.
Vivek is a software engineer Intern at Prepdha.

A hare was very proud because he could run very fast. He made fun of the slow tortoise. One day they decided to have a race. The hare slept during the race while the tortoise kept walking slowly. The tortoise reached the finish line first and won the race.
